title: The Hex
body:
A fabric-based, lightweight modpack made for low-spec devices allows you to enjoy Minecraft to the limit.

_No longer supported, check out Comfy Survival.)_

---
### All-rounder

The Hex has no content mods, so there's no need to worry that some features may not work on the server without the mods installed on the client side. No worries if you have a budget PC; we have you in mind.

### Low-Spec Requirements

From the tests using a budget computer, we output smooth gameplay both on singleplayer and Hypixel Network without shaders. If you're feeling that your specs are good enough, you can enable the shaders in the settings.

### Frequent Updates

We update the mod frequently with new mods, texture packs, and bug fixes. If you have any suggestions or complaints, feel free to contact us. Please keep in mind that the modpack is in beta and there may be bugs. If you noticed any

---
**FAQ** (frequently asked questions)

> **Q:** Are you going to update to future versions?
>>  **A:** I will try to do it as soon as possible. Keep in mind that we have to wait for the new versions of plugins for the newly released version.

> **Q:** Am I free to modify the modpack contents?
> > **A:** Yes, you are. For more, check out the Apache License 2.0.

> **Q:** How do I see what mods the modpack is using?
> > **A:** Click on your desired version, and the mods should be listed at the bottom of the page (as well as the mods' version).
